project_2_title: Foreign Object Debris Detection on Runways using CNN Based Autoencoder
project_2_description: Collaborated with Indian Airways officials, mentor Dr AV Subramanyam and team for completing project requirements in 15 days.;Developed dataset preparation, model making, and testing in 2 months. Detected 80% anomalies using Deep Learning and autoencoders to identify issues on airport runways.
project_3_description: Developed a website providing calculations for loans, deposits, and asset depreciation methods; requirement study completed in 1 month;Used HTML, JavaScript, CSS, AJAX for API calls, JSON data format, Django REST API framework, Python libraries (NumPy, NumPy Financial, Pandas, Plotly for graphs), and MySQL database;Deployed on Azure Cloud using App Services for APIs, Storage for static pages, and Azure Database for MySQL

project_4_description: Built transformer-based models (RoBERTa + BiLSTM + GCN ± ConceptNet) for deception detection in game chat;Incorporated ConceptNet, graph attention, and power features to boost detection of subtle lies;Improved Lie-F1 and macro-F1 using focal loss and oversampling to handle 4.5% truth class imbalance
project_5_title: Malware Prediction : Cybersecurity Machine Learning Project
project_5_description: Increasedmalwareandcyberthreatdetectionby20%usingmachinelearning,improving efficiency by 80%; analyzed large datasets in 2 months to develop predictive models;Appliedclassificationalgorithms(XGBoost,LightGBM,RandomForest,DecisionTree) and evaluated using AUC-ROC score for robust detection
indproj_1_title: Simple Scheduler in C: System Design
indproj_1_description: Created a scheduler in C using Round Robin Scheduling Policy, enhancing scheduling efficiency by 30%
